body.content: Site-64 is a site with over **8,000 Discord members** and is one of the **biggest** sites in SCP:Roleplay. Unfortunately, with the game slowly dying, this site has also slowly been falling along with it. As of the 3rd of May, 2026, Site-64 has officially **__ceased operations__**.

With this unfortunate news that thousands were shocked of, Site-64 will **no-longer host SSUs**. However, their Discord server will still remain as a **community server** for users. Along with this, the majority of the staff team of Site-64 has also been **archived** with Discord Moderation Team being exempted.

I cannot be more thankful for the times I’ve spent here laughing with those I call friends and joking about the most dumb things ever, whether it’s being ingame and doing my typical shenanigans or playing other games with others. I’ll always hold onto those memories and hope the rest of you do the same with the you all spent here.
We'd like to thank Site-64 for all of their contributions and happiness that they have created for the SCP:Roleplay community.

Site-97 "Veridian" is a relatively new site founded by Hendrix, who joined the SCP RP community in 2023. He joined several official servers like Site-45 and the E-11 Nine-Tailed Fox, where he currently holds the rank of Third in Command. Using his experience, he teamed up with several peers from Site-45 and launched Site-97, where he now serves as Owner and Administrator.

Site-97 is built around one goal, a fair, welcoming community free of corruption and drama, which has been Hendrix's goal from day one. As of early May 2026, the server has seen a noticeable increase in activity, with staff and higher-ups putting in more effort than before.

As for development, a custom map is currently being worked on and is expected to release around summer. Currently, the site is hosting events on the default map to keep the community engaged while they build the new one.

We strive, at least I do, in having a community where everyone feels welcome. I want people to have a fun experience roleplaying. I am against corruption and unfairness. One of the main reasons why I created this Site is because of that. I want to have people come in here, see how awesome we can be, and end up sticking around!
With a member count of 125 and growing, this community seems promising. Click the button below to join the site.
Verified Group of the Week: Epsilon-11: "Nine Tailed Fox"

Epsilon-11 "Nine Tailed Fox" is a verified group with a lot of history that is closely connected to Site-45. Founded in late 2023 under the leadership of Anthony, the faction quickly achieved elite status within that site. Even when things got tough in the summer of 2025, it seemed like they might not make it, but against all odds, Epsilon-11 "Nine Tailed Fox" managed to come out on top. Now they are like a model for Site-45. They have been that way for a long time.

Epsilon-11 "Nine Tailed Fox" has also extended their operations outside of Site-45. They have been a part of operations at Site Noctum and have established a strong presence in Area-14. They also helped members of the Verified Alpha-1 group find homes when that group was closed.

Well since taking over, me and my team kept the faction first and foremost, alive during a tumultuous Summer of 2025. It wasn't easy and even our own allies were placing bets on when we would shutter not if. However, we pulled through. We continue to work with new iterations of factions the community provides. However I suppose one of my favorite achievements of Epsilon-11 was being a bridge that healed the rift between former operatives and current ones.

Dear readers, We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause, A potential cognitohazard has been identified within the content beyond this point. Continued exposure is not advised.






 YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED
